exportDir.description: Directory bulk/picker exports are written to. Relative paths resolve against the cwd.

includeSubdirs.description: Include sessions from subdirectories of the cwd in bulk export and the picker.

includeThinking.description: Include assistant thinking blocks in the rendered Markdown.

includeToolCalls.description: Render assistant tool calls as compact one-liners (🔧 `read(path)`).

includeToolResults.description: Include tool result bodies (file dumps, command output) — usually the bulk of the noise.

maxCharsPerMessage.description: Cap each rendered message at this many characters (0 = unlimited). Truncated messages get a marker.

sessionsDir.description: Override pi's sessions base directory. When null, resolves from $PI_SESSIONS_DIR then ~/.pi/agent/sessions. A leading ~ is expanded.

replacements.description: Find/replace rules applied to export text before any redaction command runs.

find.description: Literal string, or a regular expression source when 'regex' is true.

replace.description: Replacement text. Supports $1-style group references when 'regex' is true.

flags.description: Regex flags. Ignored unless 'regex' is true.

redactionCommands.description: External CLIs run (in order) over the export before it is written. Placeholders {file} and {report} are substituted in args.

mode.description: 'scan' masks secret strings parsed from the tool's JSON output (gitleaks/trufflehog). 'filter' replaces the content with the command's stdout (or {file} when inPlace).

inPlace.description: filter mode: read the modified {file} back instead of stdout.

stdin.description: filter mode: pipe the current text to the command's stdin.

onFinding.description: scan mode fallback when findings cannot be parsed into maskable strings.

maskWith.description: scan mode: token detected secrets are replaced with.

required.description: When true, a missing executable or non-zero exit aborts the export.
